title: Reduced Copper
description: Reduces the drop rates of raw copper from copper ore to match raw iron from iron ore.
body:
A datapack for Minecraft that reduces the drop rate for raw copper from copper ore to match that of iron from iron ore, i.e., from between 2-5 units down to 1 unit.

Generated via [misode's Loot Table Generator](https://misode.github.io/loot-table/).
